title: DiscoverWorld
description: DiscoverWorld is a modpack where you can explore the world. Fabric
body: ## **No more updates** ## **Welcome to DiscoverWorld** **Join DiscoverWorld so you can discover the world and all of the new things new dimensions new biomes new mobs and find some magic or technology** **How you can setup the resource packs** ![Resource Packs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61a5e243c448dbbf47337b9d1ade5a56953e082c_0.webp) ![Resource Packs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7aa31c3b4c763d36e9c1146b7d0ac534e5680513_0.webp)
